intro: A sealed glass bottle bobs in on the tide, a curl of paper visible inside.
title: Message in a Bottle
description: A weathered bottle holds a torn scrap of a treasure map and a hand-drawn chart of the surrounding waters. Open it to claim the fragment and mark the nearby routes, or leave it to drift.

1.label: Open the bottle
1.tooltip:
(+) Gain a Treasure-Map Fragment
(+) Chart the onward routes onto your World Map
1.selected: You uncork the bottle and unfold the brittle paper...

2.label: Leave it
2.tooltip: (-) Leave the bottle on the tide
2.selected: You let the bottle drift back out to sea.

opened: A Treasure-Map Fragment, and a chart of nearby places! They are added to your World Map. (Press J to view.)
